hard_stops.logic: attempting to schedule or approve an inspection before its prerequisite inspection has passed — IBC/IRC inspection sequence must be followed
special inspection report required by IBC Chapter 17 (structural steel, concrete, fireproofing) is missing — building official will not sign off
inspection failed and deficiencies corrected but re-inspection has not been scheduled or passed
subsequent work phase has started or is scheduled to start before the required inspection for the prior phase has been completed

soft_flags.logic: deficiency correction deadline has passed without verified resolution
construction schedule shows an activity completing within 5 days but the required inspection is not yet scheduled
accessible route or unit features have not been inspected and project is approaching finishes phase
energy code compliance documentation (envelope, HVAC, lighting) is incomplete and final inspection is approaching
fire marshal approval not yet obtained and CO application is imminent
